services.title: Services
services.architectureDesc: Design scalable, maintainable systems using microservices, event-driven architecture, and cloud-native patterns.
services.fullstackDesc: Build modern, performant web applications with React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript.
services.javaDesc: Develop robust enterprise applications using Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, and Java best practices.
services.devopsDesc: Deploy and manage applications on AWS, GCP, and Azure with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.
services.performanceDesc: Identify and eliminate bottlenecks to improve responsiveness, reduce load times, and scale efficiently.
services.securityDesc: Implement security measures, conduct code reviews, and establish development standards and best practices.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.continuousLearningDesc: Committed to staying current with industry trends and best practices through regular training, courses, and certifications.

testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.joinOurClients: 👥 Join Our Growing List of Satisfied Clients
testimonials.interested: Interested in working together? Let's discuss your project and how I can help bring your vision to life.
